expectations.evidence: Both brief.md and PROGRESS.md are written in Italian. All headings, body text, interview questions, and observations use Italian language. PROGRESS.md explicitly notes 'Language: Italiano'.

Interview questions address logistics (Q17: platform vs producer-managed shipping for cross-border food), cold chain (mentioned in observations as 'catena del freddo, deperibilita'), EU regulations (Q20: 'certificazioni, tracciabilita, conformita alle regole di importazione nei vari paesi europei'), and food certifications. Observations section also flags regulatory complexity across countries.

Creates proper directory structure: produttori-ristoranti-marketplace/00-intake/brief.md and produttori-ristoranti-marketplace/PROGRESS.md. Both files exist in the expected locations with appropriate content.
